# Putting photons to work
![hero logo](https://images.ctfassets.net/i1dyhzbyi8ad/7xsE7urei6NRlUw0XNqDsr/76274b5b2ae3477ca3a914d05275fd31/map-April-2025-update-v4.png)
[](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/company/subsidiaries)
### Welcoming a new team
QCi is proud to welcome NuCrypt, Freedom Photonics, EM4, and Optogration to the QCi family to accelerate our transition from technology innovation to scalable manufacturing, reinforcing our mission to put quantum-enabled solutions into the hands of people.
### NuCrypt
NuCrypt develops inter-disciplinary technologies for emerging applications in communications and metrology.
[](http://nucrypt.net/)
### Freedom Photonics
Freedom Photonics is a leader in design, development and manufacturing of unique and innovative photonics components, modules and subsystems.
[](https://freedomphotonics.com/)
### EM4
EM4 is a leader in high-performance photonics components, modules and subassemblies with a long heritage as a preferred supplier for leading aerospace and defense contractors around the globe.
[](https://em4photonics.com/)
### Optogration
Optogration is a leader in advanced photodetectors and detector-based components with extremely high sensitivity and wide dynamic range for mission-critical applications.
[](https://optogration.com/)
#### Press Release
### Quantum Computing Inc. Announces Attendance at Upcoming Investor Conferences
[](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/news/press-releases/2026/quantum-computing-inc.-announces-attendance-at-upcoming-investor-conferences)
## Who we are
At QCi, we build practical, scalable, room-temperature quantum photonics products that harness the quantum nature of light to capture data, compute complex information, and securely communicate across networks.
Our integrated quantum photonic solutions are engineered to solve real-world challenges by saving time, reducing costs, and simplifying critical decisions.
We transform advanced quantum science into powerful tools that help people and businesses focus on what matters most.
![vision](https://images.ctfassets.net/i1dyhzbyi8ad/0Eq5RSds5cE7l7w8c57gG/3bca7e7e761305e13c357b3f4d317e31/vision.jpg)
## Whom we work with
We are proud to have partnered and collaborated with various industry partners, big and small. 
## About QCi
Quantum Computing Inc. (QCi) (Nasdaq: QUBT) is an innovative, integrated photonics company that provides accessible and affordable quantum machines to the world today. QCi products are designed to operate room temperature and low power at an affordable cost. The Company’s portfolio of core technology and products offer unique capabilities in the areas of high-performance computing, artificial intelligence, cyber security as well as remote sensing applications.
### Publications
QCi has technical talent with a range of expertise that have been publishing papers, patents, and other scientific material. The publications fall within the categories of quantum computing, reservoir computing, cybersecrity, biomedical imaging, remote sensing, and quantum communication.
[](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/learn/research-and-publications)
### Join our team
We are always looking to hire world-class talent who are passionate about developing disruptive technology that will have a positive impact on the world. Does that sound like you? Join us.
[](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/company/careers)
